name: ICICI Bank Coral RuPay Credit Card
milestoneBenefits: 2,000 reward points on spending Rs 2,00,000 and 1,000 reward points each time Rs 1,00,000 spend is crossed thereafter in an anniversary year, capped at 10,000 points per year
additionalBenefits: One complimentary domestic railway lounge visit per quarter
25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at Rs 100 twice a month, subject to spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter
1% fuel surcharge waiver on all fuel transactions of Rs 400 to Rs 4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps
additionalDetails: A transaction fee of 1% applies to utility payments exceeding Rs 50,000 per month
internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using ICICI Bank Coral RuPay page and terms.
Joining fee of Rs 500 and Annual fee of Rs 500. Annual fee is waived on spending Rs 1.5 Lakhs or more in the previous anniversary year.
Earns 2 Reward Points per Rs 100 spent on retail and UPI merchant spends (0.5% return value).
Earns 1 Reward Point per Rs 100 spent on utility and insurance spends (0.25% return value).
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions of Rs 400 to Rs 4,000 at HPCL petrol pumps.
Offers 1 complimentary domestic airport lounge access per quarter, subject to spending Rs 75,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Offers 1 complimentary domestic railway lounge access per quarter (no spends criteria).
Offers 25% discount on BookMyShow and INOX movie tickets, capped at Rs 100 twice a month, subject to spending Rs 25,000 in the preceding calendar quarter.
Eligibility: Age must be 21-65 years; minimum monthly income of Rs 20,000 for both salaried and self-employed.
